buildCommand: npm run db:migrate && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://img.clerk.com; font-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://*.clerk.com https://challenges.cloudflare.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://*.clerk.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-src 'self' blob: https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://challenges.cloudflare.com; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'
